sendemailaction.body:
Hi,

Please review vendor bank details ({custrecord_2663_parent_vendor}) submitted for approval. 

Thanks,
Trusscore
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bank Detail Approval for {custrecord_2663_parent_vendor}

sendemailaction.body:
Hi,

Please review vendor bank details ({custrecord_2663_parent_vendor}) submitted for approval. 

Thanks,

sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bank Detail Approval for {custrecord_2663_parent_vendor}

sendemailaction.body:
Hi,

Vendor Bank details for {custrecord_2663_parent_vendor} has been rejected. Please update and Re-Submit.

Thanks,
Trusscore
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bank Details Rejected ({custrecord_2663_parent_vendor})

initcondition.formula: "User" NOT IN ("Employee1","Employee2","Employee3") AND "User Role" NOT IN ("Role1","Role2")

sendemailaction.body:
Hi,

Please review vendor bank details ({custrecord_2663_parent_vendor}) submitted for approval. 

Thanks,
Trusscore
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bank Detail Approval for {custrecord_2663_parent_vendor}

sendemailaction.body:
Hi,

Vendor Bank details for {custrecord_2663_parent_vendor} has been rejected. Please update and Re-Submit.

Thanks,
Trusscore
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bank Details Rejected ({custrecord_2663_parent_vendor})

sendemailaction.body:
Hi,

Vendor Bank details for {custrecord_2663_parent_vendor} has been approved.

Thanks,
Trusscore
sendemailaction.subject: Vendor Bank Details Approved ({custrecord_2663_parent_vendor})

initcondition.formula: ( "Old Record:Bank Account Number" != "Bank Account Number" OR "Old Record:Name" != "Name" OR "Old Record:Payment File Format" NOT IN ("Payment File Format") OR "Old Record:Type" NOT IN ("Type") OR "Old Record:Bank Account Name" != "Bank Account Name" OR "Old Record:Bank Number" != "Bank Number" OR "Old Record:Bank Account Type" NOT IN ("Bank Account Type") OR "Old Record:Subsidiary" NOT IN ("Subsidiary") )
